MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Roseario Mercado is present.
Attorney Stanley Shen appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Melba Radovan is present.
Attorney Daniel Wayne representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Karen Kwong litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of July-02 -2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
